title: STORMGUARD 02SR0200914B Brown Door Brush Strip Draught Excluder, 914mm
features: seals gaps up to 25mm under the door
description: Fitting 1. With door closed, measure bottom of door width 2. Slide brush out of carrier/housing and cut carrier/housing to size 3. Using hacksaw cut brush - cut through small metal rod (only 3mm wide) holding brush in place Tip Crimp brush metal housing using pliers to prevent brushes falling out - ie squeeze ends with pliers so they are compressed 4. Offer up door seal against door, so bottom of brush is only just above floor surface closing gap between bottom door and floor, and mark where holes appear against door with pencil Tip Drill pilot holes for screws so screws can be screwed in without damaging screw head 5. Screw firmly to base of door 6. Adjust if necessary for perfect fit - slotted holes aid adjustment up or down.
